errors.msg: ExpiryNotificationService and related types not available in Widget/ShareExtension targets
errors.cause: DVGRepository.swift, NotificationActionHandler.swift, WatchConnectivityService.swift included in Widget target but ExpiryNotificationService.swift excluded; cascading missing type errors
errors.fix: Added DVGRepository.swift, NotificationActionHandler.swift, WatchConnectivityService.swift to Widget exclusions in project.yml; regenerated xcodeproj via xcodegen. Also fixed pre-existing GeofenceManager nonisolated, Color+Hex duplicate, SortDescriptor<Bool>, and frame API errors.

errors.msg: CoreImage (CIFilter) is not available on watchOS -- cannot import CoreImage module
errors.cause: Task spec incorrectly stated CIFilter is available on watchOS; CoreImage framework is iOS/macOS/tvOS only
errors.fix: Replaced CIFilter-based barcode generation with pure-Swift QR and Code128 encoders using SwiftUI Canvas rendering

errors.msg: Sending [String: Any] across isolation boundaries risks data races in Swift 6 strict concurrency
errors.cause: WCSessionDelegate methods receive non-Sendable [String: Any] dicts; passing them into @MainActor Task triggers Swift 6 error
errors.fix: Extract Sendable String values from dict on nonisolated thread, decode to Sendable [WatchDVG], then pass to MainActor

knowledge.extension-target-source-exclusions: When adding new service files to FastyDiscount/Core/Services that reference notification/location types, also update project.yml exclusion lists for FastyDiscountWidget and FastyDiscountShareExtension targets. Run `xcodegen generate` after updating project.yml to regenerate FastyDiscount.xcodeproj.
